home.eyebrow: Cloud Android access made easier from Japan
home.title: Cloud Phone Rental by Ouyang Japan
home.subtitle: No physical Android phone needed. Pick a plan and open a cloud Android phone from the web for quick trials, everyday testing, or multi-device management.
home.valuesSubtitle: Plans, activation, login details, renewal, and support are kept together so you do not have to hunt for information.

values.title: No extra phone needed
values.body: After purchase, users can open their cloud phone and view device status, orders, and expiration dates in the console.

values.title: Open it in the browser
values.body: Open the cloud phone securely in the browser without exposing internal accounts or API keys to customers.

values.title: Flexible rental periods
values.body: Choose a 7-day trial, 30-day standard plan, or business bulk option.

flow.title: Register
flow.body: Create an account with email and choose your preferred language.

flow.title: Choose a plan
flow.body: Start with a trial or use it for a full month.

flow.title: Pay
flow.body: Complete payment by following the on-page instructions.

flow.title: Open phone
flow.body: Once activated, open the cloud phone screen from the cloud phone console.

notices: Please follow the rules of each related service or platform.
Fraud, spam, attacks, and other abusive use are not allowed.

pricing.title: Pick A Plan That Fits
pricing.subtitle: Try it for a few days, use it for a full month, or contact us for multiple devices.

plans.name: Trial
plans.label: 7-Day Trial
plans.description: A light way to try one cloud phone first.

plans.name: Standard
plans.label: 30-Day Standard
plans.description: A simple one-device plan for everyday use.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: A few quick answers before you get started.

items.question: How is a cloud phone activated?
items.answer: After payment is confirmed, a cloud phone is activated for the order. The launch entry, device status, and expiration date will appear in the cloud phone console.

items.question: Can I use it right after payment?
items.answer: Activation is usually handled as soon as possible. Availability checks or safety reviews may occasionally add a short delay.

items.question: Will every app work?
items.answer: No guarantee. App policies, region, device environment, and verification requirements can affect availability.

items.question: What uses are prohibited?
items.answer: Fraud, spam, account theft, credential stuffing, phishing, attacks, bulk abusive registration, and illegal use are prohibited.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to enter the cloud phone console and manage your assigned phone.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account and choose your preferred language.
auth.name: Name

dashboard.title: Cloud Phone Console
dashboard.subtitle: Customers open and control their assigned cloud phones here, and view orders, renewals, and support tickets.

admin.title: Operations Admin
admin.subtitle: Admins manage users, orders, plans, VMOS phone inventory, device assignments, support tickets, provider API settings, and operation logs.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Defines account responsibility, prohibited use, and suspension conditions.

sections.heading: Service scope
sections.body: The platform provides third-party cloud phone access, order management, renewals, and support. The phone infrastructure is provided by third-party suppliers.

sections.heading: Account responsibility
sections.body: Users are responsible for their account information, login details, and usage. Unauthorized sharing or resale is not allowed.

sections.heading: Prohibited use
sections.body: Fraud, spam, account abuse, credential stuffing, phishing, attacks, illegal content, abusive bulk registration, and prohibited risk-bypass use are not allowed.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Explains collected data, purpose, storage, and third-party services.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: We may collect email, name, preferred language, order information, support ticket content, login records, and payment status.

sections.heading: Purpose of use
sections.body: Data is used for account creation, order processing, payment confirmation, cloud phone activation, reminders, support, and abuse prevention.

sections.heading: Third-party services
sections.body: Payment, email delivery, and cloud phone supply may be handled by third-party providers when required for the service.

legal.title: Legal Disclosure
legal.subtitle: Displays seller, price, payment, delivery, and refund information for Japan-facing sales.

sections.heading: Seller information
sections.body: Company name, representative, address, and contact details should be added before production launch.

sections.heading: Pricing and payment
sections.body: Plan pages display service prices. Stripe, PayPal, bank transfer, or other Japan payment methods can be added.

sections.heading: Delivery timing
sections.body: After payment confirmation, an admin assigns a cloud phone and the user sees launch access in the cloud phone console.

sections.heading: Refundable cases
sections.body: A refund may be reviewed if the platform cannot provide a cloud phone after payment or a platform-side issue prevents initial use.

sections.heading: Non-refundable cases
sections.body: User preference, rule violations, third-party platform restrictions, app incompatibility, or prohibited use may not qualify for refunds.

sections.heading: How to request
sections.body: Users should provide order number, account email, and reason through a support ticket.
